ddls:
CREATE TABLE "incidents" (
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each incident */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the incident */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the incident */,
  "operator_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the operator involved */,
  "route" TEXT /* Route or flight number */,
  "aircraft_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the aircraft involved */,
  "aboard" INTEGER /* Number of people aboard */,
  "fatalities" INTEGER /* Number of fatalities */,
  "ground" INTEGER /* Number of ground casualties */,
  "incident_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of incident */,
  "aircraft_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of aircraft */,
  "weather_condition_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the weather conditions at the time of the incident */,
  "investigation_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the investigation of the incident */,
  "incident_status_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the status of the incident */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("incident_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incidents_investigation_id FOREIGN KEY ("investigation_id") REFERENCES investigations ("investigation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incidents_aircraft_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("aircraft_type_id") REFERENCES aircraft_types ("aircraft_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incidents_incident_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("incident_type_id") REFERENCES incident_types ("incident_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incidents_aircraft_id FOREIGN KEY ("aircraft_id") REFERENCES aircraft ("aircraft_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incidents_operator_id FOREIGN KEY ("operator_id") REFERENCES operators ("operator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incidents_weather_condition_id FOREIGN KEY ("weather_condition_id") REFERENCES weather_conditions ("weather_condition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "operators" (
  "operator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each operator */,
  "operator_name" TEXT /* Name of the operator */,
  "operator_type" TEXT /* Type of operator (e.g., Military, Commercial, Private) */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the operator */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the operator */,
  "establishment_date" TEXT /* Date the operator was established */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("operator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "aircraft" (
  "aircraft_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each aircraft */,
  "manufacturer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the manufacturer */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the aircraft */,
  "registration" TEXT /* Registration number of the aircraft */,
  "aircraft_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of aircraft */,
  "year_of_manufacture" INTEGER /* Year the aircraft was manufactured */,
  "total_flight_hours" REAL /* Total flight hours of the aircraft */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("aircraft_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_aircraft_manufacturer_id FOREIGN KEY ("manufacturer_id") REFERENCES manufacturers ("manufacturer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "manufacturers" (
  "manufacturer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each manufacturer */,
  "manufacturer_name" TEXT /* Name of the manufacturer */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the manufacturer */,
  "establishment_date" TEXT /* Date the manufacturer was established */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("manufacturer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pilots" (
  "pilot_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pilot */,
  "pilot_name" TEXT /* Name of the pilot */,
  "license_number" TEXT /* License number of the pilot */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the pilot */,
  "experience_years" INTEGER /* Number of years of flying experience */,
  "last_medical_exam_date" TEXT /* Date of the last medical examination */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pilot_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "investigations" (
  "investigation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each investigation */,
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the incident being investigated */,
  "cause" TEXT /* Cause of the incident */,
  "contributing_factors" TEXT /* Contributing factors to the incident */,
  "incident_status_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the status of the investigation */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the investigation */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the investigation */,
  "investigation_team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the investigation team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("investigation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_investigations_incident_status_id FOREIGN KEY ("incident_status_id") REFERENCES incident_investigation_status ("incident_investigation_status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_investigations_incident_id FOREIGN KEY ("incident_id") REFERENCES incidents ("incident_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "aircraft_history" (
  "aircraft_history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each aircraft history record */,
  "aircraft_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the aircraft */,
  "maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of maintenance or incident */,
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the incident (if applicable) */,
  "maintenance_type" TEXT /* Type of maintenance */,
  "hours_flown_since_last_maintenance" REAL /* Hours flown since the last maintenance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("aircraft_history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_aircraft_history_aircraft_id FOREIGN KEY ("aircraft_id") REFERENCES aircraft ("aircraft_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ownership_history" (
  "ownership_history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ownership record */,
  "aircraft_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the aircraft */,
  "owner" TEXT /* Name of the owner */,
  "ownership_date" TEXT /* Date of ownership */,
  "transfer_date" TEXT /* Date of ownership transfer */,
  "reason_for_transfer" TEXT /* Reason for the transfer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ownership_history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ownership_history_aircraft_id FOREIGN KEY ("aircraft_id") REFERENCES aircraft ("aircraft_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_conditions" (
  "weather_condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather condition record */,
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the incident */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature at the time of the incident */,
  "wind_speed" REAL /* Wind speed at the time of the incident */,
  "weather_type" TEXT /* Type of weather (e.g., clear, cloudy, rainy) */,
  "wind_direction" TEXT /* Wind direction at the time of the incident */,
  "visibility" REAL /* Visibility at the time of the incident */,
  "cloud_cover" TEXT /* Cloud cover at the time of the incident */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("weather_condition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_conditions_incident_id FOREIGN KEY ("incident_id") REFERENCES incidents ("incident_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, analyst, researcher) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed version of the user's password */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "incident_types" (
  "incident_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each incident type */,
  "incident_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the incident type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the incident type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("incident_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "aircraft_types" (
  "aircraft_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each aircraft type */,
  "aircraft_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the aircraft type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the aircraft type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("aircraft_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "incident_investigation_status" (
  "incident_investigation_status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each investigation status */,
  "incident_investigation_status_name" TEXT /* Name of the investigation status */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the investigation status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("incident_investigation_status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "incident_outcomes" (
  "incident_outcome_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each outcome */,
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the incident */,
  "outcome_type" TEXT /* Type of outcome (e.g., fatalities, injuries) */,
  "outcome_description" TEXT /* Description of the outcome */,
  "number_of_fatalities" INTEGER /* Number of fatalities */,
  "number_of_injuries" INTEGER /* Number of injuries */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("incident_outcome_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incident_outcomes_incident_id FOREIGN KEY ("incident_id") REFERENCES incidents ("incident_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "investigation_teams" (
  "investigation_team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each investigation team */,
  "investigation_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the investigation */,
  "team_lead" TEXT /* Name of the team lead */,
  "team_members" TEXT /* Names of team members */,
  "team_size" INTEGER /* Size of the investigation team */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the team's involvement */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the team's involvement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("investigation_team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_investigation_teams_investigation_id FOREIGN KEY ("investigation_id") REFERENCES investigations ("investigation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "investigation_reports" (
  "investigation_report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each investigation report */,
  "investigation_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the investigation */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_summary" TEXT /* Summary of the report */,
  "report_file_path" TEXT /* File path of the report */,
  "author" TEXT /* Name of the report author */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("investigation_report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_investigation_reports_investigation_id FOREIGN KEY ("investigation_id") REFERENCES investigations ("investigation_id")
)
